subcodes.first_line: O leaf assured, steadfast and well-pleasing! In the Abhá Kingdom thy remembrance floweth from the tongues of the faithful, and in the realm of might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه مطمئنه مرضیه در ملکوت ابهی ذکرت ورد لسان اهل وفا و در جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
